ORDER RE PETITION FOR UNINSURED MOTORIST ARBITRATION AND FOR APPOINTMENT OF PANEL OF ARBITRATORS

NOTICE OF PETITION FOR ORDER TO COMPEL UNISURED MOTORIST ARBITRATION AND TO APPOINT A PANEL OF ARBITRATORS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARDON, MARIA ARDON, ELSY ARDON, MICHELLE HEARING SET FOR AUG-09-2004 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MARIA ARDON, ELSY ARDON, MICHELLE ARDON; PETITION FOR ORDER TO COMPEL UNISURED MOTORIST ARBITRATION AND TO APPOINT A PANEL OF ARBITRATORS. APPEARANCE: PLAINTIFF. ARGUED AND THE COURT GRANTS THE PETITION MOVING PARTY PRESENTED A TIMELY PROOF OF SERVICE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. HON.DONALD S. MITCHELL.
